desc_da: Dyb, uafbrudt kontemplation og fokus. Det syvende lem af Patanjalis ottefoldige vej.
desc_en: Deep, uninterrupted contemplation and focus. The seventh limb of Patanjali's eightfold path.

desc_da: Enkeltpunktet fokus der forbereder sindet til meditation. Det sjette lem af yoga.
desc_en: Single-pointed focus that prepares the mind for meditation. The sixth limb of yoga.

desc_da: Tilbagetrækning af sanserne fra ydre stimuli. Det femte lem af yoga. Bro mellem ydre og indre praksis.
desc_en: Withdrawal of the senses from external stimuli. The fifth limb of yoga. Bridge between outer and inner practice.

desc_da: Tilstand af dyb forening med meditationsobjektet. Det ottende og sidste lem. Yogaens ultimative mål.
desc_en: State of deep union with the object of meditation. The eighth and final limb. The ultimate goal of yoga.

desc_da: Hellige lyde eller ord der gentages under meditation. 'Man' (sind) + 'tra' (instrument/befrielse).
desc_en: Sacred sounds or words repeated during meditation. 'Man' (mind) + 'tra' (instrument/liberation).

desc_da: Universets grundlæggende vibration. Tre stavelser repræsenterer skabelse (A), opretholdelse (U) og opløsning (M).
desc_en: The fundamental vibration of the universe. Three syllables represent creation (A), preservation (U), and dissolution (M).

desc_da: Disciplineret gentagelse af et mantra, ofte med en mala (bedekrans) med 108 perler.
desc_en: Disciplined repetition of a mantra, often using a mala (prayer beads) with 108 beads.

desc_da: Meditativ praksis med fokuseret blik på et enkelt punkt, typisk en stearinlysflamme. En af de seks shatkarmas.
desc_en: Meditative practice with focused gaze on a single point, typically a candle flame. One of the six shatkarmas.

desc_da: Guidet dyb afslapning i bevidst tilstand mellem vågen og søvn. Systematisk kropsscanning og visualisering.
desc_en: Guided deep relaxation in a conscious state between waking and sleep. Systematic body scanning and visualization.

desc_da: Dybfølt intention eller løfte formuleret i nutid. Central del af Yoga Nidra og meditationspraksis.
desc_en: Heartfelt intention or resolve formulated in present tense. Central part of Yoga Nidra and meditation practice.

desc_da: Fokuseret blikretning brugt i asana og meditation. Ni drishti-punkter i Ashtanga-traditionen.
desc_en: Focused gaze direction used in asana and meditation. Nine drishti points in the Ashtanga tradition.

desc_da: Kæde med 108 perler brugt til mantra-meditation (japa). Hjælper med at holde tælling og fokus.
desc_en: String of 108 beads used for mantra meditation (japa). Helps maintain count and focus.
